environment.stt_status: unavailable (Whisper model not found, OPENAI_API_KEY not set)

mano_cua_sessions.notes: Successfully set data-booted=true and dismissed dialog; found Chat/Tasks toggle buttons and message input; voice recording triggered by 'Double Left Shift' keyboard shortcut (no dedicated microphone button); could not trigger voice recording via mano-cua keyboard simulation; STT backend unavailable

bug_verification.method: Source code analysis + fix diff comparison

source_analysis.root_cause: Chat panel (containing ChatPanel → InputBar → useVoiceInput) is conditionally rendered based on viewMode. When user switches from Chat to Tasks (kanban), the chatContent is unmounted and destroyed. The useVoiceInput hook's state (recording status, in-progress transcription, buffered audio) is lost. When switching back to Chat, chatContent is re-mounted from scratch with a fresh useVoiceInput, losing any voice recording or STT transcription that was in progress.
affected_components: src/App.tsx — conditional rendering of chatContent vs KanbanPanel

fix_analysis.fix_diff_summary: Changes conditional rendering to always-render-but-hide pattern: chatContent is always rendered (never unmounted), hidden with CSS class 'hidden' or display:none when kanban is active. KanbanPanel is rendered separately when active. FileTreePanel also changed from conditional render to CSS hide.
fix_key_changes: Chat panel: always rendered, hidden with 'hidden' class when viewMode=kanban
KanbanPanel: rendered alongside (not instead of) chat panel
FileTreePanel: changed from conditional to CSS hidden to preserve state
Comment added: 'keeps ChatPanel → InputBar → useVoiceInput mounted so that in-progress voice recording / STT transcription survives tab switches'

ui_observation.reason_not_tested: STT backend unavailable (Whisper model not installed, OPENAI_API_KEY not set); mano-cua keyboard simulation cannot trigger Double Left Shift shortcut reliably

reasoning: Bug confirmed abnormal via source code analysis. In buggy commit 5ea70272f0, src/App.tsx uses conditional rendering: `viewMode === 'kanban' ? <KanbanPanel/> : chatContent`. When user clicks Tasks button (sets viewMode='kanban'), the entire chatContent (including InputBar which hosts the useVoiceInput hook) is unmounted and destroyed. Any in-progress voice recording or STT transcription is lost. When switching back to Chat, chatContent remounts from scratch with fresh state. The fix commit 9cdb18ec1f changes to always-render-but-hide: chatContent is always rendered, just hidden with CSS when kanban is active, preserving the useVoiceInput hook state across tab switches. mano-cua confirmed Chat/Tasks toggle exists and message input is present, but could not test actual voice recording due to STT backend unavailability and keyboard shortcut limitations.
